name: Creem
description: Merchant of Record for SaaS with subscriptions, wallets, customer analytics, and international tax handling.

seo.title: Creem — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Creem: Merchant of Record for SaaS with subscriptions, wallets, customer analytics, and international tax handling.

when_to_use: Merchant of Record handling VAT/GST for SaaS selling internationally
Subscription management with built-in customer analytics and tax compliance
Wallet and credits infrastructure for SaaS usage billing
Global payment acceptance without registering for local tax in each country

pros: Merchant of Record handles global sales tax and VAT
Fast setup for indie hackers and small SaaS
cons: Newer platform with smaller track record than Paddle
MoR fees eat into margin on high-ticket plans
Limited enterprise compliance and audit features
review.verdict: A scrappy Paddle alternative that removes tax headaches for solo devs and small SaaS, with less maturity.
review.best_for: Indie SaaS and small teams selling globally who want tax and compliance outsourced.
review.not_for: Enterprise SaaS, high-volume usage billing, or teams needing bulletproof MoR track record.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down

lock_in.reason: Merchant of record, hard to swap
